title: Abolish the ATF Act
plain_summary: This bill would shut down the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives, which is also called the ATF. The ATF is a federal agency that enforces laws about guns, explosives, alcohol, and tobacco products. If this bill passes, the ATF would no longer exist and would stop all of its work. The bill is very simple and only does this one thing.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.

sections.title: Section 1  Short Title
sections.text: This law can be called the Abolish the ATF Act.

sections.title: Section 2  Abolishment of the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives
sections.text: The Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives is ended and will no longer exist.
